plugins.name: datadog
plugins.description: Skills for analysing Datadog logs for Prismatic integrations. Requires the Datadog Connector extension (.mcpb) for MCP access.

plugins.name: mcp-connector-builder
plugins.description: Skill for building and packaging custom MCP servers as Claude Desktop Extension bundles (.mcpb). Covers project scaffolding, manifest.json spec 0.3, mcpb CLI, and team distribution options.
